greeting: Do not waste your prayers on me. I have made my peace with the road.
You stopped. Most do not stop. Thank you for that much at least.
I can hear the wolves in the pines. They have been waiting since midnight.
quest: My daughter camps with the pilgrims beyond the ridge. Carry my letter to her, or stay and help me stand again. Either way, you will have my gratitude.
idle: The stars are bright tonight. I had forgotten how bright they are.
I swore an oath to see this road through to Grailsend. I mean to keep it.
